title: Mahmud of Ghazni Raided 17 Times, Enslaved or Killed 2 Million Hindus
summary: Mahmud of Ghazni raided India 17 times, looting Hindu temples including Somnath, and slaughtering or enslaving an estimated 2 million Hindus.

title: Timur Slaughtered, Enslaved 7.5 Lakh Hindus in One Day
summary: In a single day during Timur's attack on Delhi, an estimated 1.1 million Hindus were slaughtered or enslaved, with tens of thousands taken to Samarkand.

title: Akbar Killed 30,000 Hindus on Victory
summary: After the siege of Chittorgarh, Akbar had the surviving defenders and 30,000 non-combatants massacred, their heads displayed on towers across the region.

title: Maharashtrian Brahmin Genocide — 8,000 Killed
summary: Following Gandhi's assassination by Maharashtrian Brahmins, Brahmin localities in Pune and Satara saw killings, rape and arson orchestrated by Congress and allied groups.
